options.a: mechanical rate-integrating gyroscopes, and it uses a mechanically stabilised platform.
options.b: solid-state, high-precision, angular rate sensors, and it supplies data to an Inertial Navigation System (INS).
options.c: solid-state, high-precision, angular rate sensors, and it uses a mathematically maintained stable platform.
options.d: mechanical rate-integrating gyroscopes, and it receives data from the Flight Management Computer (FMC).
